scenarios.title: displays landscape image with correct src after async load @positive @e2e
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to the loading-images demo page; wait for the landscape photograph element to appear and assert its src attribute contains 'landscape' (case-insensitive).
expectedAssertions: img#landscape is present in the document after page navigation

locatorTable.notes: Mechanical By.id translation. If the reviewer confirms carries a 'landscape'-containing alt attribute (Q1), upgrade to page.getByAltText(/landscape/i) for 1.0 selector quality score.
